nasb.text: Then the Lord spoke to Moses, “Go down, warn the people, so that they do not break through to the Lord to gaze, and many of them perish.

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “Go down and warn the people, lest they break through to the Lord  to look and many of them perish.

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你下去警告人民，不可闖過來，到我這裡觀看，免得他們中間有很多人滅亡。

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你下去嘱咐百姓不可闯过界线到我这里观看，以免很多人死亡。
